warehouseId.description: Legacy field from removed warehouses module (migration 20260406220000_remove_warehouses). Preserved as optional in this schema to keep backwards compatibility with REGISTRATION_CONFIRMED events emitted before that migration. New events MUST NOT include this field. Safe to remove from schema once confirmed that 0 events in cloud-production carry it (Cloud SQL access via execute-sql or proxy required to verify; investigation deferred).

declaredWarehouse.description: Legacy field from removed warehouses module. Preserved as optional for backwards compatibility with pre-2026-04-06 events. New events MUST NOT include this field. Same removal criteria as warehouseId.
